title: Long Island Railroad Massacre
original_title: The Long Island Railroad Massacre: 20 Years Later
overview: On December 7, 1993, twenty-five people were shot on a commuter train headed from New York City to Long Island. Six people were killed, nineteen people were injured, many more were affected and continue to be to this day. This is their story.
